item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
Orby 1.1.0

  • Vectorial zoom: annotations stay sharp at all zoom levels
  • Zoom towards cursor (Cmd+scroll, pinch)
  • Dominant background color behind captures
  • Corner radius on rectangle annotations
  • WebP export format
  • Selection handles always visible, even on small captures
  • Handles clickable outside canvas bounds
  • Window capture without shadow
  • Editor refactored for better performance

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Orby 1.0.0

  • Full screen, area, window and OCR capture
  • Floating preview with pin, drag & drop, auto-dismiss
  • Editor with 11 tools: arrows, text, blur, shapes, freehand, numbered steps, backgrounds
  • Multi-selection of annotations (Shift/Cmd+click)
  • Background tool: gradients, solid colors, padding, corners, shadow
  • Capture history with thumbnail grid
  • 4 languages: French, English, Spanish, German
  • System/Light/Dark themes
  • Auto-update via Sparkle
